compiled_state.title: code-reviewer sub-agent: writes .claude/artifacts/review-status to main repo -> merge-to-main validate phase blocked by untracked file
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Summary

During merge-to-main.sh execution, a stray `.claude/artifacts/review-status` file was found untracked in the main repo's working tree. merge-to-main.sh's validate phase detected it as unexpected dirty state and blocked the push with:

  ERROR: Main repo has unexpected dirty files after merge. Fix before pushing.
    Untracked: .claude/artifacts/review-status

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Dispatch a code reviewer sub-agent that runs in or touches the main repo working directory
2. The sub-agent writes `.claude/artifacts/review-status` during review
3. Run merge-to-main.sh --resume — validate phase blocks on the untracked file

## Expected Behavior

Code reviewer sub-agents should not leave files in `.claude/artifacts/` in the main repo. The review artifact should be written to the session-scoped artifacts dir (`/tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/`) or cleaned up before the sub-agent exits.

## Actual Behavior

`.claude/artifacts/review-status` is left untracked in the main repo, blocking merge-to-main validation.

## Workaround

Manually delete the file: `rm /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/.claude/artifacts/review-status`

## Notes

- `.gitignore` covers `reviewer-findings.json` but not `.claude/artifacts/review-status`
- Adding `.claude/artifacts/review-status` to `.gitignore` would be a band-aid; the root cause is the sub-agent writing to the wrong directory
- Observed during sprint execution of epic 36a7-dbb5, session worktree-20260417-212142

comments.body: Triaged (debug-everything Bug-Fix Mode): bug targets an LLM-behavioral skill/agent/prompt file. Per CLAUDE.md rule 22 and behavioral-testing-standard Rule 5, any modification requires dedicated bot-psychologist investigation and explicit user approval. DEFERRED: batch-escalating to end-of-session user review; no code change applied this session.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Investigation (cluster B, sonnet, KERNEL): Taxonomy #5 + #13 Phantom Capability Hallucination. ROOT_CAUSE: reviewer-base.md Step 1 re-derives REPO_ROOT via `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` — in worktree sub-agent context this returns the main repo path (not the worktree), and relative .claude/artifacts/ writes land in main repo instead of session-scoped /tmp dir. Sub-agent assumes .claude/artifacts/ is always safe relative target; true only when CWD = worktree. PROPOSED_FIXES: (a) reviewer-base.md Step 3: add `export WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR="$ARTIFACTS_DIR"` before write-reviewer-findings.sh call — pins write path to orchestrator's artifacts dir via the already-supported env override (deps.sh line 267). (b) .gitignore: add `.claude/artifacts/review-status` as belt-and-suspenders guard. Confidence: high. Minimal-fix applied: true.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: USER_APPROVAL (2026-04-20): User directive — 'Fixes recommended by bot-psychologist are approved' for all Category D intent-confirmed clusters. Cluster B fixes approved: (a) reviewer-base.md Step 3 export WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR, (b) .gitignore add .claude/artifacts/review-status. Build-review-agents.sh regen required.
comments.author: Test
